nasb.text: The sons of Benjamin said, “They are struck down before us, as at the first.” But the sons of Israel said, “Let us flee that we may draw them away from the city to the highways.”

esv.text: And the people of Benjamin said, “They are routed before us, as at the first.” But the people of Israel said, “Let us flee and draw them away from the city to the highways.”

cnv.text: 便雅憫人說：“他們仍像前一次一樣，敗在我們面前了。”以色列人卻說：“我們逃跑吧，引他們離開城市出到大路上來。”

ccb.text: 便雅悯人说：“我们又打败他们了。”但以色列人已经商议好，用诈败的方法诱敌离城到大路上来。
